Professional Notary Services

Trusted. Certified. Available.

Schedule Appointment
Who We Are

Precision. Integrity. Trust.

We don't just notarize documents—we safeguard your most important legal transactions with unwavering professionalism.

As a licensed, bonded, and insured notary public, every signature we witness carries the weight of legal certainty. Whether you're closing a real estate transaction, executing a power of attorney, or authenticating business documents, we bring meticulous attention to detail and absolute compliance with state regulations.

Our mobile service brings this expertise directly to you—your office, your home, or any location that suits your schedule. Because legal matters don't wait, and neither should you.

Services

What We Notarize

Premium mobile and in-office notarization backed by meticulous process control and punctual arrivals.

Mobile Loan Signings

Certified Signing Agent support for refinances, HELOCs, and purchase closings—at your borrower’s doorstep.

  • Dual-tray laser printing & scan-back ready
  • Same-day document prep confirmation
  • Nationwide title & lender compliance
Reserve a signing

Real Estate Closings

Purchase, seller, and commercial packages executed with meticulous ID checks and funding conditions.

  • Witness coordination available
  • Immediate scan-backs & shipping
  • After-hours & weekend coverage

Estate & Personal Planning

Wills, powers of attorney, healthcare directives, and trusts notarized with patient guidance for families.

  • Mobile witnesses upon request
  • Up to four signers accommodated
  • Certified copies & record retention

Apostille Preparation

Authentication packages for international documents with courier coordination to the PA Department of State.

  • Document review before notarization
  • State submission tracking updates
  • Expedited return shipping options

Business & Corporate

Operating agreements, compliance affidavits, vendor contracts, and structured settlement packages.

  • On-site or virtual conference rooms
  • Batch notarization for large teams
  • Document confidentiality controls

General Notary Work

Certified copies, school forms, travel consents, employment verifications, and structured ID checks.

  • Mobile service across the Lehigh Valley
  • Walk-through reminders for required IDs
  • Text alerts when your notary is en route

Every appointment includes advanced confirmation, signer preparation guidance, and a compliance-ready audit trail.

Credentials
$100K Errors & Omissions
Annual Background Screen

Pennsylvania State Commissioned

NNA Certified Signing Agent & Fidelity Approved

Mobile coverage across Lehigh Valley & 50-mile radius

  • Bonded & insuredErrors & Omissions policy: $100,000
  • Background checksSterling Verified, renewed annually
  • Professional membershipsNational Notary Association · American Society of Notaries

Sundays are reserved for emergency appointments only. Contact us directly for assistance.

Your Details

FAQ

Common Questions

Straight answers to the details clients ask before their signing.

Bring a current government-issued photo ID for every signer. We’ll also request unsigned documents and any lender-provided instructions for review.

Acceptable IDs include driver’s licenses, state IDs, passports, and military IDs.

In-office notarizations start at $15 per signature. Mobile appointments add a travel fee based on distance and urgency, quoted before we dispatch.

Loan packages receive flat-rate pricing that includes document scan-backs when required.

Yes. We travel to homes, offices, hospitals, and secure signing locations across the Lehigh Valley and surrounding Pennsylvania regions with protective document handling.

Emergency appointments outside normal hours can be arranged via phone.

We notarize multilingual documents provided every signer can communicate with the notary in English to confirm willingness and understanding.

For complex legal translations we can recommend vetted interpreter partners.

An acknowledgment verifies identity and willingness; a jurat requires an oath or affirmation in our presence. We guide you to the correct certificate during scheduling.

Still unsure? Share your document beforehand and we’ll confirm the correct notarial act.

Contact

Get in Touch

Send the details, we’ll confirm logistics and arrive prepared.

Message our team

We respond within one business day—or sooner for urgent appointments.

Concierge scheduling

  • Call (267) 309-9000Daily 7am – 9pm
  • contact@keystonenotarygroup.comResponses within 12 hours
  • Service area:Lehigh Valley, PA & 50-mile radius

All appointments include document prep guidance and ID verification checklist.

Prefer video consultations? Request a secure virtual session in your message.

Spacing Key

The modular spacing scale keeps gutters, stacking rhythm, and component breathing room consistent from cards to full-width sections.

  • --space-2xs Tight label padding & icon nudges
  • --space-xs Compact gaps & control groupings
  • --space-sm Default input padding
  • --space-md Card interior gutters
  • --space-lg Stack spacing between headings
  • --space-xl Grid gutters & media padding
  • --space-2xl Card exterior margins
  • --space-3xl Section top rhythm
  • --space-4xl Hero & feature padding
Call Keystone

Notary Assistant

Licensed, bonded, and insured mobile notary public delivering concierge-level signing experiences across Pennsylvania and surrounding areas.
